evidence.source_title: Iran's Balkan front: The roots and consequences of Iranian cyberattacks against Albania
evidence.description: The HomeLand Justice cyberattack was motivated by Iran's desire to retaliate against Albania for sheltering the MEK (Mojahedin-e Khalq) at Camp Ashraf-3.

editorial_notes: MEK's presence in Albania was the stated motivation for the Iranian cyberattack.
